title: [IV/MTS] P:WIC [Project: World in Conflict]
body:
[RU]

Наш контент пак для мода Immersive Vehicles предлагает вам побывать за рычагами военной техники различных временных периодов.

Распространять проект на иных сайтах кроме CurseForge и Modrinth Запрещено!

1. tg: (https://t.me/pwic_official)
2. discord: (https://discord.gg/mqpXAfhkQx)

Зависимости:

IV/MTS [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-transport-simulator]

OCP [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/transport-simulator-official-vehicle-set]

Также выражаю особую благодарность разработчику Wartich - VEB за обучение написанию некоторых функций для техники в моде.

[EN]

Our content Immersive Vehicles mods offers you to drive military vehicles of various time periods.

Reuploading this project on other sites except CurseForge and Modrinth is prohibited!

1. tg: (https://t.me/pwic_official)
2. discord: (https://discord.gg/mqpXAfhkQx)

This mod requires:

IV/MTS [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-transport-simulator]

OCP [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/transport-simulator-official-vehicle-set]

I also want to give special thanks to developer Wartich - VEB for teaching me how to write some of the functions for the vehicles in the mod.
